prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-TWCTPBPFL-STD-BL Product Type: TREADMILL Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Existing Title: Laminated Treadmill Workout Cardio Training Poster By Productive Fitness Description: Treadmill Workout Conditioning Poster is ideal for anyone using a treadmill. Whether you are a novice or a seasoned treadmill user this poster will ensure that each workout will strengthen your cardio and fitness levels, while offering important safely advice.

Easy to read bullet points highlight the important aspects of proper posture, safety, and how to us a treadmill properly. For beginners this post offers advice on the best way to get started with a treadmill exercise routine.

The Poster describes setting up your workout, how to select the best heart rate range for your fitness goals, and explains what muscles are being used through the display of colorful anatomy drawings.

Poster comes laminated for protection; this is a perfect addition to any gym, home gym, or anyone interesting in learning more about exercise sciences. Search Terms: fitness poster health planner at home gym workout excercise information womens diet nutrition exercise dumbell bodyweight ball body weight stretching Features: - Walks you through your workout, target heart rate, and muscles used while exercising - Perfect addition to any gym or home gym - Colorful anatomy drawings - Provides important safety information - Ideal for novice or advanced treadmill users === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Productive Fitness Laminated Treadmill Workout Poster

anthropic.title_differentiation: Cardio Training Guide, Safety Instructions, Heart Rate Targets, Anatomy Drawings, Beginner To Advanced

openai.title_differentiation: Laminated, Target Heart Rate Guidance, Colorful Anatomy Drawings, Safety Tips, Beginner To Advanced Users, Home Gym
